---
title: "test data wrangling"
format: html
editor: visual
---

#Setup
```{r}
#| message: false
#| warning: false
library(tidyverse)
library(janitor)
library(daymetr)
```

#Load data
```{r}
#| message: false
#| warning: false
meta <- read_csv("../2026dsa_finalproject_group9/data/testing/testing_meta.csv")

soil <- read_csv("../2026dsa_finalproject_group9/data/testing/testing_soil.csv")

submission <- read_csv("../2026dsa_finalproject_group9/data/testing/testing_submission.csv")

```

#Clean data
##Meta
```{r}
meta <- meta %>% 
  mutate(site = substr(site, 1, 4)) %>%  # removing previous crop
  select(-previous_crop) 

meta_clean <- meta %>%
  distinct(site, year, .keep_all = TRUE)
```

##Soil
```{r}
soil_clean <- soil %>% 
  mutate(site = substr(site, 1, 4)) %>% 
  distinct(site, year, .keep_all = TRUE)
```

#Join datasets
```{r}
full_dataset <- submission %>%
  left_join(soil_clean, 
            by = c("site", "year")) %>% 
  left_join(meta_clean, 
            by = c("site", "year"))
```

#Add weather data
```{r}
full_dataset %>%
  distinct(longitude, latitude) # distinct coordinates
```

```{r}
full_dataset %>%
  distinct(site) #number of distinct sites
```

```{r}
unique_sites <- full_dataset %>% 
  distinct(site, year, latitude, longitude) #selecting unique coordinates & sites to be able to pull from daymet
unique_sites
```
##Pulling from daymet
```{r}
daymet_all <- unique_sites %>% #extracting weather data from daymet
  mutate(weather = pmap(list(.y = year,
                             .site = site,
                             .lat = latitude,
                             .lon = longitude),
                        function(.y, .site, .lat, .lon)
                          download_daymet(site = .site,
                                          lat = .lat,
                                          lon = .lon,
                                          start = .y,
                                          end = .y,
                                          simplify = T,
                                          silent = T) %>%
                          rename(.year = year,
                                 .site = site)
                          ))
daymet_all
```

```{r}
daymet_all_unnest <- daymet_all %>% #unnesting
  rename(lat = latitude, lon = longitude) %>%
  unnest(weather) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = measurement,
              values_from = value) %>%
  janitor::clean_names() %>%
  select(site, year, latitude, longitude, yday, dayl_s, prcp_mm_day, srad_w_m_2, swe_kg_m_2, tmax_deg_c, tmin_deg_c, vp_pa)

daymet_all_unnest
```

```{r}
daymet_month <- daymet_all_unnest %>% #adding month column
  # Creating a date class variable  
  mutate(date_chr = paste0(year, "/", yday)) %>%
  mutate(date = as.Date(date_chr, "%Y/%j")) %>%
  # Extracting month from date  
  mutate(month = month(date)) %>%
  mutate(month_abb = month(date, label = T))
daymet_month
```

```{r}
daymet_month_sum <- daymet_month %>% #summarizing weather variables across month
  group_by(year, site, latitude, longitude, month_abb) %>%
  summarise(across(.cols = c(dayl_s,
                             srad_w_m_2,
                             tmax_deg_c,
                             tmin_deg_c,
                             vp_pa),
                   .fns = mean,
                   .names = "mean_{.col}"),
            across(.cols = prcp_mm_day,
                   .fns = sum,
                   .names = "sum_{.col}")) %>%
  ungroup()


daymet_month_sum
```

```{r}
final_daymet_monthsum <- full_dataset %>%
  left_join(daymet_month_sum, #joining weather data for each coordinate back to the original dataset
            by = c("site", "year", "latitude", "longitude"))
final_daymet_monthsum
```

```{r}
daymet_year <- final_daymet_monthsum %>% #summarizing weather variables by year for each hybrid type
  group_by(year, site, hybrid, yield_mg_ha, longitude, latitude, soilpH, om_pct, soilk_ppm, soilp_ppm) %>%
  summarise(across(.cols = c(mean_dayl_s,
                             mean_srad_w_m_2,
                             mean_tmax_deg_c,
                             mean_tmin_deg_c,
                             mean_vp_pa),
                   .fns = mean),
            across(.cols = sum_prcp_mm_day,
                   .fns = sum)) %>%
  ungroup()
daymet_year
```
```{r}
write_csv(daymet_year,
          "../2026dsa_finalproject_group9/data/testing/weathercombinedtest.csv")
```
